variants.title: PI1710 8
variants.option1Value: Filtrec FS181B8T125 Suction Strainer | Replaces the Mahle PI1710/8
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec FS181B8T125. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the FS181B8T125 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Suction Strainer, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 125µ, Outer Diameter: 131.0 mm, Length: 162.0 mm, Thread: 2" BSP, Δ Collapse Pressure: 1 bar, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 125µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 1 BAR

variants.title: PI1710 8
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P171893 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer | Replaces the Mahle PI1710/8
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P171893 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer is designed to capture larger contaminants before they enter the hydraulic system, protecting sensitive components from damage. Its coarse filtration capability helps extend the life of downstream filters and improves overall system performance. Ideal for low-pressure applications, this strainer offers durable construction and easy installation. Itâ€™s a cost-effective solution for maintaining hydraulic fluid cleanliness and preventing clogging in pumps and valves.

variants.title: PI1710 8
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 77713 Suction Strainer | Replaces the Mahle PI1710/8
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 77713 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 133.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 98.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 2"-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 163.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 128.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 125µ, Outer Diameter: 131.0 mm, Length: 162.0 mm, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Thread: 2" BSP, Collapse Pressure: 1 BAR, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
